prediction.reasoning: For AT&T (T), a large-cap telecom utility stock with relatively low volatility, I used a daily volatility estimate of ~1.2% based on typical telecom sector movements. Over 3 days, this translates to approximately 2.1% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes random walk (no drift), with confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ±0.67σ, 80% CI uses ±1.28σ, and 90% CI uses ±1.65σ scaling factors.
